description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and a combination of black and white exterior walls. Large rectangular windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the interior spaces. The structure includes a prominent main entrance, a visible staircase, and multiple rooms arranged in an L-shaped layout. The rear section appears to have a garage or storage area with shelving, while the front section includes a spacious, glass-enclosed area that could serve as a living or dining space. The interior is divided by partial walls, and the overall footprint is expansive, suggesting a single-story layout. The use of glass, concrete, and wood elements gives the bungalow a contemporary urban appeal.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of black and white exterior walls, featuring an L-shaped layout and spacious interior rooms.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a prominent staircase inside, with black exterior walls.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the garage or storage area with shelving and white exterior walls, as well as interior room divisions.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the glass-enclosed area, multiple large windows, and the overall L-shaped footprint of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the garage/storage section, visible shelving, and a mix of black and white wall finishes.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows and glass-enclosed front area
